text.title: Risk Assessment Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: Date not ISO; risk missing id/likelihood (P10/P50/P90)/severity/owner/trigger/decision; parked array absent.

list.pattern: Likelihood expressed as 'medium' or 'high' instead of P10/P50/P90.
